hero.subtitle: We build it — not by creating systems, but by restoring connections.
hero.lede: Linum Core is an engineering studio that does not build systems — it restores connections between people, processes and the technology that should serve them.

manifesto.quote: There is an unseen connection. We build it — not by creating systems, but by restoring connections.

competencies.title: What We Do
competencies.subtitle: End-to-end solutions that restore your digital connections
competencies.lede: Disciplines we practice with care. Each serving the same intent: restore the connection between purpose and outcome.

dev.title: Software Development
dev.description: Custom systems built with modern technology stacks, tailored to your business needs.

consulting.title: Systems Consulting
consulting.description: Strategic analysis and roadmaps to align your technology with your business goals.

api.title: API Integration
api.description: Connecting your existing systems and third-party services into a unified, reliable layer.

maintenance.title: Maintenance & Support
maintenance.description: Preventive maintenance, bug fixes, and continuous monitoring

architecture.title: Architecture Design
architecture.description: Scalable, secure system architecture designed for growth and resilience.

transformation.title: Digital Transformation
transformation.description: Guiding businesses through the transition to modern digital operations.

portfolio.title: Our Work
portfolio.subtitle: Projects that connect people and systems

about.title: About the CEO
about.subtitle: Gabriel Gomes
about.bio: I'm Gabriel Gomes, founder and CEO of Linum Core. With years of experience in software development, systems consulting, and digital transformation, I help companies build the connections they didn't know they were missing.
about.bio2: My approach combines technical precision with a deep understanding of business needs — delivering solutions that are not just functional, but transformative.

ceo.lede: Linum Core began with one person. It still has one person at the centre of every decision.
ceo.name: Gabriel Gomes
ceo.bio1: Software engineer for over a decade, having passed through banks, health startups and product studios. Believes that code is prose — and that good prose begins with listening well.
ceo.bio2: Linum Core was born from a frustration with generic solutions sold for singular problems. Here each client is treated as a case of their own — because they are.

feedbacks.title: What Clients Say
feedbacks.subtitle: Real results, real connections
feedbacks.lede: Those who have worked with Linum Core.

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.subtitle: Ready to restore the unseen connection in your business?
contact.lede: Tell us the problem. Within 48 hours you receive a written first diagnosis — free, no pushed proposal.
